scope.summary: Splits the classifier vector-embedding grammar normalization seam into a private guard module without changing classifier verdicts, and lowers the classifier max-file-size ratchet.
out_of_scope: Changing classifier admission semantics, guard policy, fuzz-target logic, or any test expectations.
Splitting additional classifier regions beyond the vector-embedding parser-normalization grammar seam.
Claiming a hosted scheduled fuzz campaign or full workspace cargo gate.

entry_points.name: implementation commit
entry_points.trace: `git show --stat HEAD` for b233fff05d323c66cbc07b46bcbef7732c778b64 reported exactly five paths: crates/oraclemcp-guard/src/classifier.rs, crates/oraclemcp-guard/src/classifier_grammar.rs, crates/oraclemcp-guard/src/lib.rs, crates/oraclemcp-guard/fuzz/Cargo.lock, and scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh. The split moves the vector-embedding parser-normalization helper and its private token helpers into a private module; no tests were edited.

entry_points.name: scoped guard compile
entry_points.trace: `env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo check -p oraclemcp-guard` exited 0 after the split.

entry_points.name: differential adversarial corpus
entry_points.trace: `env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp-guard --test adversarial_corpus -- --nocapture` exited 0: 15 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored, including `strict_corpus_is_never_underclassified`, `corpus_is_never_underclassified`, and `classifier_never_panics_on_arbitrary_input`.

entry_points.name: full guard regression suite
entry_points.trace: `env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp-guard` exited 0: 319 unit tests passed, all guard integration tests passed, and the profiling baseline remained ignored as before. The run includes the existing metamorphic, proptest, purity, policy-gate, certificate, and CTE-DML adversarial checks.

entry_points.name: cargo-fuzz classifier target
entry_points.trace: `env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target/cod6-fuzz-classify timeout -k 10 240 scripts/build_lease.sh -- env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 cargo +nightly-2026-05-11 fuzz run --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu classify_fuzz -- -runs=256 -rss_limit_mb=2048 -timeout=10 -seed=4001` exited 0. libFuzzer reported `DONE` after 256 runs with no crash or assertion failure.

entry_points.name: ratchet and formatting
entry_points.trace: `env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh` exited 0 after lowering `crates/oraclemcp-guard/src/classifier.rs` from 7814 to 7678 lines; `cargo fmt --all -- --check` also exited 0.

limitations: The cargo-fuzz proof is a bounded local smoke of the existing classify_fuzz target, not a hosted scheduled fuzz campaign.
No full workspace cargo clippy/test gate is claimed from this shared checkout.
The evidence source is current reproducible HEAD after later unrelated pane commits; the implementation commit for this bead is b233fff05d323c66cbc07b46bcbef7732c778b64.
